title: ProcScript for Disconnected Record Sets
text: ProcScript for Disconnected Record Sets Uniface supports XML, JSON, and Uniface Structs for disconnected record sets and provides specialized ProcScript instructions for saving, loading, reconnecting and querying data from disconnected record sets. Table 1. ProcScript for Disconnected Record Sets Command Purpose xmlsave and xmlload Save data as XML to a disconnected data set, and load it into a component. websave and webload Save data as JSON to a disconnected data set, and load it into a component. Note: Uniface uses these commands in DSPs to pass data to and from the browser. componentToStruct and structToComponent Save data as a Struct to a disconnected data set, and load it into a component. reconnect or retrieve/reconnect Reconnect data that has been loaded from a disconnected record set with the data already in the component and the database, if connected. $occstatus $occcrc $occdel $occmod $occproperties $storetype Get (or set) the values of reconnect properties Was this topic helpful?
